vision: A premium, high-fidelity 'Elite Editorial' accounting and fiscal platform tailored for the Dominican Republic market, bridging the gap between automated bookkeeping and DGII (606/607) compliance.

frontend.design_system: Arctic Glass (Glassmorphism, High Contrast, Crimson Accents)

artificial_intelligence.purpose: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and financial data extraction from fiscal physical documents.
artificial_intelligence.logic: Strict JSON output response with DGII 606/607 category auto-mapping.

landing_page.experience: Cinematic 'Editorial' portal with glassmorphic cards and motion-driven value propositions.
key_features: Dynamic Hero Section
Feature Parallax
Elite Pricing Tables

dashboard_home.purpose: Fiscal 'Command Center' providing a high-level view of tax health and operational status.
key_features: TaxSummaryCard: Real-time ITBIS balance (Issued vs. Purchase ITBIS).
Revenue/Expense Visualization: Multi-axis fiscal comparisons.
Recent Activity Stream: Live feed of synchronized NCF documents.

purchases_module_606.purpose: Hardened workflow for managing company expenses and generating DGII 606 reports.
key_features: AI Vision Capture: Drag-and-drop receipt scanning with Gemini 1.5.
PurchaseImportReview: Side-by-side validation of AI-extracted data against physical document image.
DGII Exporter: Validated .txt generation for 606 format.
Expense Categorization: Auto-classification (01-11 DGII codes).

sales_module_607.purpose: Control center for revenue tracking and 607 (Sales/Income) report generation.
key_features: Revenue Tracking: Monthly gross income and collected ITBIS metrics.
Client Association: Direct link between sales and CRM entities.
Voiding Engine: Fiscal handling of 'Anuladas' for 607 compliance.
Export Utility: Validated .txt generation for 607 format.

crm_clients_module.purpose: Elite entity management system for fiscal customers and suppliers.
key_features: RNC/Cédula Persistence: Validated identity tracking.
Fiscal Type Control: (Crédito Fiscal, Consumo Final, Especial, etc.).
Sync Engine: Intelligent backfill from existing invoice history.
Compliance Score: 'Behavior' tracking (Óptima, Riesgo, etc.).

invoices_module.purpose: Electronic Invoicing (e-CF) engine for document emission.
key_features: NCF Sequence Management: Internal tracking of available fiscal sequences.
InvoiceForm: Dynamic line-item engine with automated ITBIS calculation.
Status Lifecycle: (Draft -> Issued -> Paid -> Voided).
Payment Tracking: Pending vs. Collected balance tracking.
Corporate Profile: RNC and commercial address master data.
e-CF Signature: .p12 Certificate management with local encryption.
Role-Based Access (RBAC): Admin, Accountant, Viewer levels.
Security Center: PIN and Password hardening.

invoices_table.description: Unified fiscal document storage supporting 606 and 607 workflows.

data_engineering_v1_3.rls_policies: Owner-Level Isolation: Users can only see and modify documents where auth.uid() = user_id.

elite_ui_library.EliteDropdown: State-managed glassmorphic dropdown with 'Sin opciones' logic and parent container overflow overrides.
elite_ui_library.EliteSegmented: Motion-tracked slider for binary or triple-state fiscal selections.
elite_ui_library.Sidebar: 410px wide premium navigation anchor with overflow-visible support for pop-out menus.
elite_ui_library.Modal: Arctic Glass overlay system with spring-physics transitions.

operational_milestones: Unified 'expense_type' and 'revenue_type' into a single database-ready schema.
Implemented Arctic Glass design tokens across all 7 dashboard modules.
Hardened the AI Parsing engine (Gemini 1.5 Flash) for Caribbean-specific fiscal formats.
Expanded the sidebar to 410px to accommodate high-fidelity typography and controls.
